plugins.cameraPermission: Loom uses the camera once, to scan the pairing QR on your laptop.

plugins.//: The LAN bridge is ws:// (cleartext transport) but app-layer sealed (ChaCha20-Poly1305 under the pairing key), so release builds must allow cleartext or the WebSocket fails instantly — debug allowed it via a Metro overlay, masking this until a release build.

plugins.microphonePermission: Loom uses the mic for hold-to-talk dictation into a pane.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Loom turns your speech into text to send to a pane.
